THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AL-WADI, MARYOM ANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, ALBERT (VICE PRES, WESTERN REGION) TALIOFERRO PROPERTY MANAGERS JENKINS, CALVIN (OPERATIONS DIRECTOR) BREEDYE, ROGER (PAINTER) $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $380.00, ALBERT NELSON AND CALVIN JENKINS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
